title: EnergyResourceStorage
description: Typed schema for stationary battery energy storage resources (BESS). CIM: cim:BatteryUnit (IEC 61970-302). BATTERY is a deprecated alias for BESS. EV charging stations (EV_CHARGER, EV_V2G) moved to EnergyResourceEVCharger/v1.0. storageCapacityKwh is exclusive to this kind. maxExportKw (discharge, ≥0) and maxImportKw (charge, ≥0) replace maxDischargeRateKw / maxChargeRateKw.

type.description: Asset-class discriminator. BATTERY is deprecated; use BESS. CIM: cim:BatteryUnit (IEC 61970-302). EV charging stations use EnergyResourceEVCharger (EV_CHARGER, EV_V2G).

subResources.description: Child resources (e.g. battery modules, charger ports). Each item is a bare id string or an inline EnergyResource object.

parentResources.description: ids of parent resources (e.g. the meter this DER sits behind).

GeoJSONGeometry.description: GeoJSON geometry per RFC 7946 / beckn GeoJSONGeometry/v2.0. Coordinates are [longitude, latitude] in WGS-84 (EPSG:4326). For a point: {type: 'Point', coordinates: [lon, lat]}.

Location.description: Physical location per beckn Location/2.0. geo (required) is a GeoJSONGeometry; address (optional) is a postal address. Coordinates are [longitude, latitude] per RFC 7946.

EnergyResourceStorageAttributes.description: Attributes for BESS resources. Includes common fields (make, model, maxExportKw, maxImportKw, ratedPowerKw, telemetryProvider, commissioningDate, location) plus storage-specific fields (storageCapacityKwh, storageType, stateOfHealthPct).

ratedPowerKw.description: Manufacturer-rated peak power, kW. Kept for backward compatibility. Prefer maxExportKw.

maxExportKw.description: Maximum discharge power injected to the grid, kW. Always ≥0. CIM: BatteryUnit / PowerElectronicsConnection.maxP (injection).

maxImportKw.description: Maximum charge power drawn from the grid, kW. Always ≥0. CIM: BatteryUnit / PowerElectronicsConnection.maxP (absorption).

telemetryProvider.description: Vendor API / data source identifier for telemetry.

commissioningDate.description: ISO 8601 date-time when this storage asset was commissioned.

storageCapacityKwh.description: Rated stored-energy capacity, kWh. CIM: BatteryUnit.ratedE. Exclusive to EnergyResourceStorage — replaces energyCapacityKwh from EnergyResource v1.1.
